narrative:
Copley Twp F (precinct in Summit County) has 1,151 registered voters, with 53.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.4 percentage points.
